hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

commands.name: component
commands.description: This command is used to manage components.

commands.name: build
commands.description: builds a component. Runs all configured component inputs

commands.name: init
commands.description: Initializes a component and creates a component file

commands.name: list
commands.description: Lists the component of the project

commands.name: add
commands.description: Adds a component to the project

commands.name: project
commands.description: This command is used to manage projects.

commands.name: restore
commands.description: Reloads the schema of a project

commands.name: build
commands.description: Replaces all variables in the project files with their values

commands.name: init
commands.description: Initializes a project and creates a project file

commands.name: validate
commands.description: Validates the configuration files of a project

commands.name: report
commands.description: Generates a report for the project

commands.name: solution
commands.description: This command is used to manage solutions.

commands.name: restore
commands.description: Reloads the schema of all the projects in the solution

commands.name: build
commands.description: Replaces all variables in the solution files with their values

commands.name: init
commands.description: Initializes a solution and creates a solution file

commands.name: validate
commands.description: Validates the schema of all the projects in the solution

commands.name: variable
commands.description: This command is used to manage variables.

commands.name: get
commands.description: resolves a variable by name

commands.name: set
commands.description: sets a variable. Overrides existing value if any.

commands.name: list
commands.description: list available variables

commands.name: copy
commands.description: Copies a variable from one provider to another provider

commands.name: validate
commands.description: Validates the schema of all the projects

commands.name: encrypt
commands.description: Encrypts a file using the configured provider

arguments.name: input-file
arguments.description: The path to the file to encrypt or decrypt.

arguments.name: out-file
arguments.description:
The file to write the encrypted or decrypted data to. 
If not provided the input file will be overwritten. 
Existing files will be overwritten.

commands.name: decrypt
commands.description: Decrypts a file using the configured provider

arguments.name: input-file
arguments.description: The path to the file to encrypt or decrypt.

arguments.name: out-file
arguments.description:
The file to write the encrypted or decrypted data to. 
If not provided the input file will be overwritten. 
Existing files will be overwritten.

commands.name: config
commands.description: This command is used to manage config.

commands.name: show
commands.description: Shows the configuration to a file

commands.name: set
commands.description: Sets a configuration value in the nearest .confixrc

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: The path to the configuration file

arguments.name: value
arguments.description: The value to set as json

commands.name: list
commands.description: Lists the configuration to a file
